description_long: This object consists of a banquet-style round dining table set for eight, accompanied by a buffet serving station composed of three rectangular tables arranged in a line. The round table is covered with a blue tablecloth, set with white plates, silverware, glasses, and a central floral arrangement, and surrounded by eight wooden chairs. The buffet tables are also draped in blue cloths and feature a series of chafing dishes, beverage dispensers, and trays for food service. The chafing dishes are metallic with lids, while the beverage dispensers are cylindrical and metallic, likely for coffee or hot drinks. The overall setup suggests a formal or semi-formal event, such as a wedding, banquet, or conference meal. The materials appear to be primarily wood, metal, fabric, and plastic, with a focus on functionality and presentation.
description: A banquet setup featuring a round dining table with eight chairs and a buffet line of three tables with chafing dishes and beverage dispensers, all draped in blue cloths.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the round dining table with place settings and the buffet line with chafing dishes and beverage dispensers.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the arrangement of the buffet tables and the round dining table with chairs in the foreground.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the length of the buffet line and the circular arrangement of the dining table and chairs.
description_view_3: Rear view of the buffet line with a clear look at the beverage dispensers and chafing dishes, with the round table and chairs behind.
attribute_number_of_legs: Each table supported by four legs; eight separate chairs with four legs each
